product_name: Lamaze Gardenbug Foot Finder and Wrist Rattle Set
product_description_under_30_words: A Lamaze Gardenbug set with soft classic foot finder socks and Velcro wrist rattles that jingle when legs and arms move during supervised floor play.
ember_verdict: Kicks start making noise on purpose at this age. Soft bug socks stay put so a flail becomes a rattle without needing a precise grab yet. Use on the playmat during nappy changes when feet are already in the air and you can watch the whole time.
rank_rationale: #1: clearest dedicated foot-finder sock design with deep UK familiarity.
caveats: Socks can slip off bigger calves; never for sleep.
ownership_note: Often already owned from newborn gifts.
safety_notes: Supervised awake play only; remove for sleep.
buying_factor_memo: True foot-finder socks ranked above clip-ons and chew companions. Playgro and Lamaze capped at two. Live UK sock SKUs were scarce — companions documented honestly with founder flags.

best_for_tag: Best for foot and wrist packs
product_description_under_30_words: A Playgro Jungle Friends pack with zebra and giraffe wrist rattles, soft foot finders and linking teethers for kick and reach rewards on the mat.
ember_verdict: If Gardenbug is already in the drawer, this pack still earns a look for extra foot finders and chew links. Kicks that rattle teach action and sound without needing a grab first. Rotate pieces when one is drying after a wash cycle.
rank_rationale: #2: true foot finders plus chew backups in one purchase.
ownership_note: Skip if Gardenbug plus many teethers owned.
substitute_if_unavailable: Playgro Wrist Rattle and Foot Fingers
buying_factor_memo: True foot-finder socks ranked above clip-ons and chew companions. Playgro and Lamaze capped at two. Live UK sock SKUs were scarce — companions documented honestly with founder flags.

product_name: Playgro Wrist Rattle and Foot Fingers
product_description_under_30_words: A Playgro gift box of sunny wrist and foot rattles designed to reward arm and leg movement during supervised floor play on the mat.
ember_verdict: A brighter alternative to character jungle packs if you want plain action and sound on wrists and feet. Movement makes the noise, which is the whole job at this age. Stay with supervised awake play; never leave rattles on for sleep or unsupervised spells.
rank_rationale: #3: true foot/hand rattles; Playgro brand capped.
caveats: Higher price than Gardenbug; Playgro capped at two.
ownership_note: Playgro already used — avoid a third.
buying_factor_memo: True foot-finder socks ranked above clip-ons and chew companions. Playgro and Lamaze capped at two. Live UK sock SKUs were scarce — companions documented honestly with founder flags.

product_description_under_30_words: The original Sophie La Girafe natural rubber teether kept beside kick socks so when feet and hands meet the mouth, a soft rubber chew is ready on the mat.
ember_verdict: Kicking discovery often ends with toes or toys in the mouth. Sophie covers that next beat when socks have done their noisy job. Ranked after true foot finders because dedicated socks are the category spine, while Sophie is the mouthing companion on the same mat.
rank_rationale: True foot finder sets beat mouthing companions for this card; Sophie is the strongest chew beside kick play.
caveats: Not a sock set; Lamaze capped at two.
evidence_notes: Coolshop buyable 2026-07-24. Founder: thin UK sock SKU market.
buying_factor_memo: True foot-finder socks ranked above clip-ons and chew companions. Playgro and Lamaze capped at two. Live UK sock SKUs were scarce — companions documented honestly with founder flags.

product_description_under_30_words: A soft Lamaze Jacques Peacock with hanging bits and a clip, so you can hang a colourful kick target above the playmat during supervised floor play.
ember_verdict: When socks are washing, a hanging peacock still rewards a kick or bat with movement and sound. Clip it to a gym bar or pram frame where feet can reach. Ranked after true foot finders because socks teach body mapping more directly than a hanging toy alone.
rank_rationale: True foot finder sets beat hanging toys for this card; Jacques is the strongest clip target when socks are in the wash.
evidence_notes: Hamleys buyable. Thin sock market documented.
